name: Airport Park
description: Airport Park is a place to play pickleball in Colchester, VT. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Appletree Park
description: Come play pickleball at Appletree Park in Burlington, VT! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net.

name: Bayside Park Playground
description: Bayside Park Playground is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Colchester, VT. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: Szymanski Park
description: Come play pickleball at Szymanski Park in South Burlington, VT! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility is wheelchair accessible. Reservations are not available.

name: The Kiwini Club
description: Come play pickleball at The Kiwini Club in Shelburne, VT! There are 3 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: The Pop!
description: Come play pickleball at The Pop! in South Burlington, VT! There are 7 indoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. The facility includes amenities like food, restrooms, water, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, locker rooms, and youth programming. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: The Pop - Essex
description: Come play pickleball at The Pop - Essex in Essex Junction, VT! There are 8 indoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to lights, food, restrooms, water, youth programming, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and locker rooms. The courts can be reserved.

name: Vermont Pickleball Powered by The EDGE Total Health Network
description: Vermont Pickleball Powered by The EDGE Total Health Network is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in South Burlington, VT. There are 17 hard courts. 8 are outdoors and 9 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms, water, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, food, locker rooms, and adaptive programming.

name: Veterans Memorial Park
description: Come play pickleball at Veterans Memorial Park in South Burlington, VT! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility.
